steps.title: Spot the critical contrast in the notes
steps.content: The strongest signal is the notes' before-and-after picture: Wong Fei-hung gained local recognition during his lifetime but “has become an internationally known folk hero thanks to his depiction in” media. To emphasize media's effect on his legacy, the answer must highlight this transformation.

steps.title: Find the answer emphasizing media's role
steps.content:
B directly contrasts his local recognition with his international fame after media depictions, using causal language (“turned him into”) to show how media built his legacy.
  • A reverses the relationship
  • C omits the transformation mechanism
  • D focuses on depicting abilities rather than building legacy
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
